blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,553 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 14" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
